inputs.label: Distance (yards)
inputs.businessContext: Standard test distance for NFL Combine is 40 yards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard test distance for NFL Combine is 40 yards.
businessContext_i18n.tr: NFL Combine için standart test mesafesi 40 yardadır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Testdistanz für NFL Combine beträgt 40 Yards.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance de test standard pour le NFL Combine est de 40 yards.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia de prueba estándar para el Combine de la NFL es 40 yardas.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps enregistré pour le sprint de 40 yards.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo registrado para la carrera de 40 yardas.

inputs.label: Player Weight (lbs)
inputs.businessContext: Body weight of the athlete to estimate power output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Body weight of the athlete to estimate power output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güç çıkışını tahmin etmek için sporcunun vücut ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht des Athleten zur Schätzung der Leistungsabgabe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel de l'athlète pour estimer la puissance de sortie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso corporal del atleta para estimar la potencia de salida.

inputs.label: Wind Speed (mph)
inputs.businessContext: Wind speed, positive for tailwind, negative for headwind, to adjust effective time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Wind speed, positive for tailwind, negative for headwind, to adjust effective time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rüzgar hızı, arkadan rüzgar için pozitif, karşıdan rüzgar için negatif, etkin süreyi ayarlamak için.
businessContext_i18n.de: Windgeschwindigkeit, positiv für Rückenwind, negativ für Gegenwind, zur Anpassung der effektiven Zeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse du vent, positive pour un vent arrière, négative pour un vent de face, pour ajuster le temps effectif.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad del viento, positivo para viento de cola, negativo para viento de frente, para ajustar el tiempo efectivo.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
